source_file_path.title: Source File Path
source_file_path.description: Local path of the file available to the function runtime

bucket_name.title: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: UiPath Orchestrator storage bucket name where the file will be uploaded

folder_path.title: Folder Path
folder_path.description: UiPath Orchestrator folder path where the storage bucket exists

bucket_directory.title: Bucket Directory
bucket_directory.description: Optional directory path inside the storage bucket, for example monthly-reports

bucket_file_path.title: Bucket File Path
bucket_file_path.description: Optional exact destination path inside the bucket. When empty, the source file name is used.

bucket_name.title: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: UiPath Orchestrator storage bucket used for upload

bucket_file_path.title: Bucket File Path
bucket_file_path.description: Path of the uploaded file inside the storage bucket

source_file_path.title: Source File Path
source_file_path.description: Local path of the file uploaded

file_size_bytes.title: File Size Bytes
file_size_bytes.description: Size of the uploaded source file in bytes

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: Detected MIME type for the source file
